/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/noise_gate_plugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libnoise_gate_plugin.so -o libnoise_gate_plugin.so CMakeFiles/noise_gate_plugin.dir/noise_gate_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/noise_gate_plugin.dir/noise_gate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/noise_gate_plugin.dir/noise_gate_plugin.cpp.o  ../../src/libopenamp-dsp.a
